name: JBT Marel Corporation
summary: JBT Marel Corporation (likely referring to a combination of John Bean Technologies and Marel) provides integrated food processing solutions, systems, and services to the poultry, meat, and fish industries. The corporation focuses on enhancing yields, improving food quality and safety, and reducing costs for its customers. The headquarters are likely split between JBT in Chicago, Illinois and Marel in Gardabaer, Iceland.
